title: EASTERN OREGON COMMUNITY BASED SERVICES HUB - 211info
text: MALHEUR EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EASTERN OREGON COMMUNITY BASED SERVICES HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support for school readiness, including parenting materials to support early learning. 363 A Street W Vale, OR 97918 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 473-3138 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 473-3138 Program contact (541) 889-8613 Rod Belkap [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Baker, Malheur, and Wallowa Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Parenting Materials School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - PRESCHOOL PROMISE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES AND PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
